title: Extended timeline ensured accurate voter list: U.P. CEO
description: Handling elections in a huge State like Uttar Pradesh is challenging because people are politically aware and political parties and their cadres are very active, says the Chief Electoral Officer and adds there was no hurry to complete the special intensive revision of electoral rolls as the Assembly poll is about a year away; deaths, duplicate entries, and people shifting their residences behind large number of deletions in draft list, he says
